case_title: ERIN CAPITAL MANAGEMENT LLC VS. RHINER VONFLACKE et al

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-20-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-20-2009 CONTINUED TO JUL-22-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. THE MAY-20-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF HANDLING ATTORNEY FROM MOSHE SELIKOVITZ TO ROBERT N. PHAN AND PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL
